product_overview: Arabseed Premium Backend is a Next.js API-based proxy service that relays video streams and poster images from external sources. It is designed to bypass CDN, CORS, and hosting limitations while delivering media content to clients.
core_goals: Proxy external video streams through a backend API to support reliable playback
Proxy external poster images to avoid CORS and direct-fetch restrictions
Provide simple, unauthenticated API endpoints for media retrieval
Return appropriate HTTP errors when upstream sources or request parameters are invalid

features.name: Video Stream Proxy API
features.description: Allows clients to request a video URL through the backend so the server fetches and streams the content back to the client.
user_flows: GET /api/stream?url=https://cdn.shabakaty.com/video.mp4 with a valid external video URL -> Receive 200 with streamed video content -> Client begins playback using the proxied stream
GET /api/stream without the required url query parameter -> Receive 502 Bad Gateway or an upstream fetch failure response -> Client cannot retrieve the stream
GET /api/stream?url=invalid-url with a malformed or unreachable source URL -> Receive 502 Bad Gateway -> Client handles stream load failure

features.name: Image Proxy API
features.description: Allows clients to request a poster image through the backend so the server fetches the image from an external endpoint and returns it to the client.
user_flows: GET /api/proxy?endpoint=https://cdn.shabakaty.com/poster.jpg with a valid image URL -> Receive 200 with the proxied image bytes -> Client displays the poster image
GET /api/proxy without the required endpoint query parameter -> Receive 400 Bad Request -> Client shows an error state or fallback image
GET /api/proxy?endpoint=invalid-url with a malformed or inaccessible image URL -> Receive 500 Internal Server Error -> Client handles image load failure

features.name: Video Stream Proxy API
features.description: Proxies video streams from external CDN to bypass Vercel limitations or route traffic through tunnels.

endpoints.description: Fetches video files from external sources and streams them to the client

features.name: Image Proxy API
features.description: Proxies poster images to bypass CORS or external restrictions.

endpoints.description: Fetches images from external URLs and returns them
